note: Surface triage for EigenLayer PermissionController (v1.12.0 impl 0x36dd260a...eed2; NEW in ELIP-002). This contract IS a permission-delegation primitive: it lets an account grant admins and selector-scoped appointees to act on its behalf across EigenLayer core. EVERY function is user-callable and permission-related — ALL cover (ScopeBall's raison d'etre). No off-chain signed structs.

0x950d806e.name: setAppointee
0x950d806e.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT primitive — account grants `appointee` the right to call `target.selector` on the account's behalf (address account, address appointee, address target, bytes4 selector). Selector-scoped delegation of call authority. The single most security-critical EigenLayer grant for ScopeBall; never exclude.

0x06641201.name: removeAppointee
0x06641201.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — revoke an appointee's (target,selector) right (address account, address appointee, address target, bytes4 selector). Revocation of delegated authority; cover (permission state change).

0xeb5a4e87.name: addPendingAdmin
0xeb5a4e87.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — propose a new admin for an account (address account, address admin). Admins control the account's whole EigenLayer permission set; the most powerful grant. Cover.

0x628806ef.name: acceptAdmin
0x628806ef.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — pending admin accepts admin rights over an account (address account). Completes an admin delegation; cover.

0x4f906cf9.name: removePendingAdmin
0x4f906cf9.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — cancel a pending admin proposal (address account, address admin). Permission state change; cover.

0x268959e5.name: removeAdmin
0x268959e5.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — remove an existing admin from an account (address account, address admin). Revokes top-level delegated authority; cover.
